response.original_title: ONE Fight Night 43: Tang vs. Gasanov
response.overview: ONE Fight Night 43: Tang vs. Gasanov was a combat sports event produced by ONE Championship that took place on May 16, 2026, at Lumpinee Boxing Stadium in Bangkok, Thailand. A ONE Featherweight World Championship bout between current champion Tang Kai and Shamil Gasanov headlined the event.
response.title: ONE Fight Night 43: Tang vs. Gasanov
